race.comment: ATLANTIC SPIRIT (7) finished off nicely from the back at Ascot to miss in a photo finish over this distance on resumption. She'll be better for that effort and while she is likely to get back again, a good tempo is expected. The form out of her last start has stacked up and she can go one better now. SPECTACULAR PARK (10) ended last campaign in good order and his latest trial coming into this was solid. Pike liked what he saw at the trials and hops on board for his return, with the 6YO never missing the placings when fresh. Can feature in the finish. LORD SHIVA (3) bolted in on resumption in a CL3 at Ascot when never giving anything a chance. Can find the front from the draw and Watson knows him well. Fitter again now and can repeat the dose without surprising. XENTARO (6) maps to get every chance on the quick turnaround and is not to be discounted. CHARINO (1) rates highly on the fresh effort and won't be far away.
